name: Zabimaru (Female)
description:
Zabimaru is the name of [Renji Abarai's](https://anilist.co/character/906/Renji-Abarai) Zanpakutō. Their spirit takes the form of a white baboon with a [snake](https://anilist.co/character/29307/Zabimaru-Male) as it's tail. The two intelligent beings have separate personalities, and are competitive between one another. The Baboon is seen as the calmer creature, being far more relaxed in expressing his desires, whereas the Snake is more impertinent and isn't afraid to berate its wielder.

In an anime original arc, during the Zanpakutou Rebellion initiated by [Muramasa](https://anilist.co/character/24133/Muramasa), Zabimaru takes on a new manifestation of two separate, humanoid beings; an adult woman and a small boy with a snake's tail. The boy is attached to the female's waist by a black chain that is connected to a collar on his neck and nicknamed Hebi, while the woman is nicknamed Saru. Saru and Hebi are very critical of Renji, calling him a moron and claiming he is weak. Both Saru and Hebi have fangs. 

Saru is usually the one to keep Hebi on-task and berates him when Hebi messes around. However, at the end of the day, she deeply cares about him and simply wants the best for them.
